module_overview.title: Module Overview
description: The Material Characterization module allows the analysis and electromagnetic characterization of different materials using a NanoVNA.
The module supports characterization workflows with dedicated calibration kits adapted to each measurement method, improving accuracy and repeatability for specific applications.
Both solid and liquid materials can be characterized depending on the selected method and measurement setup.
Through the obtained S-parameters, the system enables the analysis and estimation of electromagnetic properties such as relative permittivity and permeability across frequency.

characterization_section.title: Material Characterization
characterization_section.import_description: Import a complete characterization package that already contains its associated calibration and configuration data.
